feed.title: Current Watches, Warnings and Advisories for New Zealand issued by MetService
feed.rights: Copyright Meteorological Service of New Zealand Limited, 2026. Licensed under Creative Commons BY 4.0.

entry.title: Heavy Rain Watch
entry.summary: Periods of heavy rain, with thunderstorms possible. Rainfall amounts may approach warning criteria in localised areas. Chance of upgrading to a Warning: Moderate.

author.name: Meteorological Service of New Zealand Limited

entry.title: Severe Thunderstorm Warning
entry.summary:
At 03:15 pm, MetService weather radar detected severe thunderstorms near MATAMATA, TIRAU, WAHAROA, PUTARURU, THE MAMAKU PLATEAU, TE POI, OKOROIRE, LICHFIELD and HINUERA.
These severe thunderstorms are moving towards the southeast, and are expected to lie near THE MAMAKU PLATEAU, MAMAKU, THE SOUTHERN KAIMAI RANGES, TE WHETU and THE HILLS AND RANGES EAST OF TOKOROA at 03:45 pm and near ROTORUA, REPOROA, WAIOTAPU, WAIKITE VALLEY, GOLDEN SPRINGS, LAKE TARAWERA, OKERE FALLS, NGONGOTAHA, WAIREKA and GUTHRIE at 04:15 pm.
These thunderstorms are expected to be accompanied by very heavy rain.
Impact:
Very heavy rain can cause surface and/or flash flooding about streams, gullies and urban areas, and make driving conditions extremely hazardous.

author.name: Meteorological Service of New Zealand Limited
